title: centaurea litochorea
intro: Centaurea litochorea, also known as mountain centaury, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea litochorea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
